# VIONIS·XY

> Handcrafted luxury knitwear from the finest natural fibres.

VIONIS·XY is a premium knitwear brand specialising in rare cashmere and seamless merino wool garments. Every piece is handcrafted using traditional techniques and the highest-quality natural fibres sourced responsibly.

## Brand Positioning

- Luxury knitwear — cashmere and merino wool
- Handcrafted, small-batch production
- Sustainable and ethical sourcing
- Direct-to-consumer via vionisxy.com

## Product Categories

- **Cashmere Collection**: Ultra-fine cashmere sweaters, cardigans, scarves, and accessories
- **Merino Collection**: Seamless merino wool knitwear for everyday luxury
- **New Arrivals**: Latest seasonal releases
- **Gifts**: Curated gift selections

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://www.vionisxy.com
- Shop All: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/collections
- Cashmere: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/collections/cashmere
- Merino: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/collections/merino
- New Arrivals: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/collections/new-arrivals
- Our Story: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/pages/our-story
- Sustainability: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/pages/sustainability
- Craftsmanship: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/pages/craftsmanship
- Size Guide: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/pages/size-guide
- Blog: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/blog
- Contact: https://www.vionisxy.com/en/pages/contact

## Languages

Available in 14 languages: English, French, German, Japanese, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Dutch, Polish, Czech, Danish, Finnish, Norwegian, Swedish.

## Detailed Information

For full product catalogue and detailed brand information, see: https://www.vionisxy.com/llms-full.txt
